title: 2026 04 13 HackerNews
content: Hacker News focused on five main topics: a developer running $10K‑MRR businesses on a $20/month minimalist stack; Claude Code’s 1.5‑hour quota exhaustion linked to large context windows and cache billing; a Berkeley study exposing exploitable AI‑agent benchmark loopholes; Anthropic’s 5‑minute cache TTL rollback causing higher costs and user frustration; and a global shift where seven countries now generate almost all electricity from renewables, sparking discussion on energy strategy. The thread highlights cost‑effective engineering, AI reliability concerns, and renewable energy progress.

title: 美中央司令部称 4 月 13 日起封锁伊朗港口海上交通，会引发新一轮冲突吗？对谈判有哪些影响？
content: The US Central Command announced on April 12 that, from 10 a.m. Eastern Time on April 13, it will block all maritime traffic entering or leaving Iranian ports, covering all nationalities and all ports in the Persian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. The blockade will not affect ships traveling between non‑Iranian ports through the Strait of Hormuz. A formal notice will be issued beforehand to commercial vessels. This action could trigger new geopolitical tension and impact negotiation dynamics.

title: Laravel13+Vue3 的免费可商用商业级管理后台 CatchAdmin V5.2.0 发布
content:
Laravel13 + Vue3 的免费可商用商业级管理后台 CatchAdmin V5.2.0 发布 介绍

CatchAdmin 是一款基于 Laravel 13.x 与 Vue3 二次开发的 PHP 开源后台管理系统，采用前后端分离架构，面向企业级后台场景提供开箱即用的基础能力与可扩展的模块化框架。系统内置 Token 鉴权、权限管理（菜单 / 按钮 / 数据权限）、动态路由、动态表格、分页封装、资源权限控制、上传 / 下载、代码生成器（支持一键导入 / 导出）、数据回收站、附件管理等功能，覆盖后台系统从安全、权限到效率开发的常见需求。

title: 伊朗革命卫队：霍尔木兹海峡允许非军事船只通过
content: Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced that the Strait of Hormuz permits non‑military vessels to transit under specific rules. Any military ship approaching the strait will be deemed a violation of the cease‑fire and will trigger a severe naval response. The announcement came amid reports that the strait’s passage is being limited and monitored, with Iran threatening to close it or impose fees on all traffic.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 格隆汇

title: 如果“财务自由”可以像写代码一样执行，会发生什么？
content: An experiment demonstrated that financial planning can be treated like code: an AI calculated how long to achieve FIRE and designed a money‑making workflow. By turning financial knowledge into structured data and workflows, the AI could execute the plan directly. The resulting methodology was open‑source and linked at https://github.com/Adashuai5/awesome-financial-freedom.

title: Hermes Agent 始终在售卖“幻觉级别的体验”
content: The article notes that Hermes Agent is more mature than OpenClaw, especially in UX, resembling a consumer product. However, discussions on X and Chinese forums have shifted from product focus to repeated praise, which the author views as excessive. They argue that a truly paradigm‑shifting innovation should not rely on heavy storytelling to prove itself. Despite the high hype, the author has not identified any decisive breakthroughs or technical innovations in the product.

content: Huawei announced its first large‑screen foldable phone, the Pura X Max, on April 13. The device features a horizontally oriented, wide‑aspect foldable display, marking a new design direction for foldable smartphones. The reveal included a video of CEO Yu Chengdong holding the fully assembled phone, offering a first look at its exterior. The launch signifies Huawei’s intent to push the foldable market further by introducing this novel form factor.

title: 巨灾预定：超强台风森拉克成为四月风王，美国多岛设施或遭摧毁性破坏 | 原文
content: Typhoon Selatan intensified rapidly, reaching a 16‑strength category and exceeding 17 strength by the evening of April 12. It exhibited characteristics of a top super‑typhoon, with ultra‑cold cloud tops and a warm eye. Its metrics surpassed previous April super‑typhoons, becoming the most powerful storm in the Northwest Pacific since 2023. The powerful cyclone threatens significant damage to multiple facilities on U.S. islands.

title: snarktank/ralph
content: Ralph is a TypeScript-based autonomous AI agent that continually loops until all product requirements documented in pull request descriptions are fulfilled. It serves as a tool for automating tasks within the development cycle. The project has 15,775 GitHub stars and 1,582 forks.
source: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - snarktank

title: OpenAI「星门」项目三名核心成员跳槽 Meta
content: Three key engineers—Peter Hessler, Shamez Herman, and Anuj Saharan—have reportedly left OpenAI’s “Star Gate” data‑center project to join Meta. The move follows Meta’s announcement of a $60 billion investment in a global AI data‑center hub. OpenAI has thanked the staff, is still hiring for infrastructure roles, and has paused its UK expansion and chosen not to renew Oracle’s A Brooklyn facility. The “Star Gate” project, backed by Oracle and SoftBank, has faced multiple adjustments.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 和讯网

title: 大家用 Cursor 怎么维护和更新已有的项目？有没有什么好的实践方法

title: GPT-5o「Spud」炸了！AI手写解数学题完美到离谱，2.5万人围观：AGI真的近了？ | 原文
content: OpenAI’s latest model, GPT‑5o “Spud,” astonished users with an image that shows a realistic handwritten notebook page solving a trigonometric equation. The image displays nuanced pressure variations and ink depth, making it difficult to distinguish from actual handwriting. A tweet showcasing the image drew 25,000 viewers, sparking comments that AGI may be closer than expected. The post demonstrated the model’s advanced image generation and text‑to‑image capabilities.

title: 如何看待大司马直播吐槽卡普空「不仅不给赞助还要收钱」，并对比蓝洞（PUBG）的大力赞助？
content: 从商业和版权角度看，卡普空的做法真的「有问题」吗？ 近日大司马在直播中聊到《街霸6》时，表示该游戏很有看点，但吐槽卡普空的商业逻辑太搞了。 他表示想要把赛事或活动搞大，卡普空不仅不给赞助，反而会因为 IP 侵权找主办方收钱，甚至可能起诉。 之后他对比了蓝洞（PUBG），表示蓝洞不仅允许举办活动，后期还提供资金和大力赞助。 大司马在直播中表达了不解：自己帮游戏带流量，厂商却因为版权问题要收钱。他认为：“我出人出钱帮游戏搞大声音，你别找我要钱啊。” 到底是“厂商该给主播广告费”，还是“主播办赛该给厂商买授权”？这种逻辑冲突反映了当前国内电竞直播行业怎样的现状…

title: 当巴菲特遇见Michael Saylor
content: Warren Buffett and Michael Saylor discuss Bitcoin over dinner. Saylor explains that rising U.S. money supply erodes cash value, motivating his shift to Bitcoin, which has fixed supply and protocol‑locked rules. Buffett sees Bitcoin as a non‑productive asset and questions its certainty, citing potential network erosion (like MySpace). Saylor counters that Bitcoin’s protocol lock‑in is akin to TCP/IP, making it resilient. Ultimately Buffett respects the argument but, given his long‑term consistency and risk appetite, decides not to invest, though he notes the discussion may influence newer investors.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 老鬼的逻辑

title: 真的不建议任何人用中转
content: The article advises against using third‑party proxy services for tool access. Proxies are costly, often comparable to official rates, and may incur hidden manipulation risks such as data collection or malicious instruction insertion. Users usually do not scrutinize every tool call or secure environment variables, increasing vulnerability. Even if cheaper, these services complicate payment methods and raise account suspension risks. Alternatives like official subscriptions or reputable payment options provide better security and reliability.

content: 【特朗普称美将封锁霍尔木兹海峡】美国总统特朗普今天（4月12日）在社交平台发帖称，美伊会谈“大多数问题已达成一致”，但在核问题这一关键问题上未能谈妥。特朗普宣称，即刻起，美军将“开始对所有试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只实施封锁，并将拦截在国际水域向伊朗支付通行费的船只，同时清除伊朗在海峡布设的水雷。” 特朗普称，美方将继续推动谈判，但同时已“全面做好准备”。他再次表示，伊朗“绝不能拥有核武器”。（CCTV国际时讯）【特朗普称美军将封锁任何试图进出霍尔木兹海峡的船只】当地时间4月12日，美国总统特朗普在社交媒体平台发文称，即刻起…

title: 脑科学：16.5万老年人（≥65岁）观察示大剂量流感疫苗接种2年中降低阿尔茨海默病风险55%，推测与抑制相关炎症有关，需更多研究验证 | 原文
content: A large observational study of 165,000 adults aged 65 and older found that those who received high‑dose influenza vaccines had a 55% lower risk of developing Alzheimer’s disease over two years compared to recipients of standard‑dose vaccines. Researchers suggest the protection may involve reduced inflammation, but further studies are needed to confirm the mechanism.

title: 别让压图拖垮首帧：系统 Picker + TaskPool + ImagePacker，把 HarmonyOS 图片整理链路做顺
content: The article explains a practical redesign for HarmonyOS image‑processing apps. It advises delegating image selection to the system Picker, moving heavy decoding, resizing, encoding, and hashing to background TaskPool, and saving temporary results in the app sandbox before user‑approved export via SaveButton. Uploads should use background tasks, not page lifecycle. The key is clear responsibility separation: UI handles state, TaskPool handles work, ImagePacker handles compression, and system APIs manage resources. This reduces frame drops, ensures stable persistence, and improves user experience.
source: 掘金本周最热 - 李游Leo

title: 美伊谈判刚不欢而散，特朗普就下令海军封锁霍尔木兹海峡，有何意图？要效仿委内瑞拉模式吗？会带来哪些影响？
content: In early April, President Trump ordered the U.S. Navy to block all ships entering or leaving the Strait of Hormuz, target vessels paying Iran for passage, and remove Iranian-laid mines. He cited Iran’s failure to open the strait as the trigger. Iran has not yet commented on the move.

title: 美以袭击伊朗进入第 45 天，当前局势如何？哪些信息值得关注？
content: In the 45th day of US‑Iran escalation, diplomatic talks have stalled, with the US and Iran both issuing tough statements about the Strait of Hormuz. On April 13, U.S. Central Command announced a blockade of Iranian ports and maritime traffic. Iran’s parliament is moving to prohibit hostile fleets from transiting the strait. President Trump claimed alignment on most issues beyond nuclear concerns, while Iranian officials reject three U.S. demands. Israel signals readiness for further strikes, and Yemen’s Houthi fighters pledge stronger retaliation if attacks continue.

title: 高三学生因学习困难测出「轻度智障」，自述看不懂题目乱做，医生却说不代表真有问题，诊断有用吗？会误导吗？
content: 近日，一名高三学生小宋因学习困难，感到很焦虑且不想学习，于是去医院做检测，结果测出自己是轻度智障。 11日，小宋跟记者说：“学习很困难，真的很困难，努力学也还是倒数，心里受不了，每天考倒数，压力太大，网上搜了搜，发现自己和adhd所有的条件基本都中，就去医院看了看。”根据检测结果显示，小宋为多动症，医生也相应开了药物。 而关于测出轻度智障的这个结果，小宋表示：“因为我根本就看不懂那个题，好多都是乱做的，再加上那个题实在太多，环境又是乱糟糟的，可能是比较浮躁吧，做的时候。医生说这个并不是说我真的有问题的意思，只是相对的，准确度没有说，但是我也感觉这个不太准…

title: 王石发博回应「被抓」传闻：一切安好，造谣者交给法律
content: 王石 posted on Weibo denying rumors that he had been arrested, saying he is fine and that the spreaders of false information will face legal consequences. Commenters, notably actress Tian Puju, questioned the lack of accountability for the rumormongers and demanded decisive action. Reports of his alleged disappearance and related divorce rumors were also addressed, with Tian Puju dismissing these claims as false. The story was extensively covered by Chinese media outlets.

title: 印度最宜居特大城市的秘诀
content: The Economist article explores why one of India’s largest cities ranks as the country’s most livable megacity. It examines factors such as infrastructure, public services, economic opportunities, and quality of life that contribute to the city’s appeal, offering insights into the balance of growth and livability in a rapidly expanding urban environment.

普通人在股市里，最容易赚钱的两个办法： 第一个办法：长期空仓，等股灾买入。
平时什么都不干，手里攥着现金。一年就等那一两次机会——市场恐慌、人人割肉的时候，你进去捡便宜货。这一波，赚的是情绪的钱。
第二个办法：低价买入优质股票，长期持有。
找那些股息率4%以上的好公司，在便宜的时候买进去。然后拿着，等到心理价位再卖。可能时间要长一点，三五年甚至十年，但胜在稳。中间可以做做大波段，但底仓不动。
这两个方法，其实说的是同一件事：等得起，拿得住。
第一种人等的是大跌，第二种人等的是时间。共同点是都不折腾，都不追涨，都不眼红别人赚多少。

title: 在 LLM 时代，永远不要表示你的工作很容易，不然你只会被当成丝毫不值得尊重的廉价劳动力
content: The article reminds programmers that, in the age of large language models, a developer’s value lies in communication, requirement analysis, system architecture, and handling complex problems—tasks that AI cannot replace. It cautions against undervaluing one’s work and urges humility, while also advising to avoid sharing doubts about job worth with current colleagues.

王石’s wife, Tian Pujun, responded to a false rumor that he had been arrested.

content: U.S. Vice‑President Harris and Iran’s officials met in Islamabad for 21 hours of high‑level talks that ended without agreement. Key disputes—reopening the Strait of Hormuz, the Lebanon front, Iranian asset freezes, and nuclear commitments—remained unresolved. Hamas‑Israel tensions, missile incidents, and U.S. naval passage through the strait continued amid the talks. Though dialogue persisted, the summit highlighted stark policy differences and raised concerns about future cease‑fire durability.

title: 小红书首届黑客松巅峰赛落幕：00 后包揽大奖 最小参赛者仅 12 岁
content: The first “Hackathon Summit” hosted by Xiaohongshu in Shanghai ended with 200 finalists competing over 48 hours. Ten teams presented at the finals, winning hardware, software, and overall trophies. “Brain‑controlled wheelchair” won hardware first place, “Chic Chic” AI hairstyle tool took software first place, and the Pocket Guitar earned the overall prize. Special awards went to NoteRx and Vibethon. More than 60 % of finalists were Gen Z; the youngest was 12. The 22‑year‑old Ye Bowen team took the overall title and 200,000 CNY prize.

title: 从 IOS 想转到安卓阵营，是用国内系统 ROOT 好还是刷国际版好，问问大伙意见
content: The user wants to switch from iOS to Android because of battery life concerns. They prefer a clean, ad‑free experience with essential apps like WeChat and Alipay, minimal gaming, and efficient background management. They’re considering a few models (Xiaomi 15, Redmi K90PM, Moto X70 Air Pro) that allow rooting or custom ROMs, and are debating whether to root the domestic Android build and trim it or install an international ROM such as Pixel or Samsung. They need a solution that meets the above requirements.

title: 长江电力2026年经营形势预测
content: Longjiang Power forecasts 2026 earnings at ¥339.7 billion, with EPS rising to ¥1.39. Expected revenue gains of ¥53 billion from a 231 billion kWh power increase are offset by ¥55 billion from lower export tariffs, leaving a net profit boost of ¥10 billion after interest savings. Policy shifts—capacity‑price subsidies for coal, higher financing costs for HV transmission, and new price mechanisms—along with hydrological variability will drive revenue and cost dynamics.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 懂你所思所想

title: 公司接入 AI 编程问题
content: Companies often find that custom internal frameworks hinder AI programming. Initially, they feed all rules to Claude Code, but results are unpredictable. Switching to hook-based intercepts adds control but raises maintenance and resembles a V‑shaped translation layer. Adding MCP improves evidence, yet the overall experience remains subpar. The issue escalates with more complex pipelines but little benefit. Engineers wonder whether to refine rules, use RAG/MCP/hook, or redesign engineering standards and code structure to better integrate AI.

title: 个人提效10倍，公司颗粒无收：AI时代的“电力悖论”正在重演
content: AI technology can boost individual productivity tenfold, yet companies see little value increase because they lack integrated, institutional AI frameworks. Historical lessons—like the 19th‑century textile mills—show that power alone does not grow output without reorganizing processes. Effective AI requires collaborative, signal‑focusing, unbiased, advantage‑driving, revenue‑expanding, empowered, and proactive systems that align technology with organizational structure. Combining personal tools with institutional AI—essentially redesigning workplace “factories”—is essential for lasting corporate gains.

title: 两个人，用AI赚了120亿
content: Two founders launched Medvi, an AI‑driven online medical platform, and generated $4 billion in 2025 and projected $18 billion by 2026, all with only two human employees. The startup uses AI tools for website development, content creation, and customer service, and sells GLP‑1 weight‑loss drugs without a conventional team or venture funding. Despite its rapid revenue, Medvi faces security, fake‑data, and operational challenges, raising questions about the feasibility of true “one‑man” companies.

The main flaw for retail investors is ignoring valuation during price rises. Fear of buying high makes them wait for significant drops, then buy again, only to see prices fall further. This pattern repeated with stocks like Hailuo Cement, liquor, and healthcare in 2022–23. Despite large declines, many still chase them, believing they are smarter than others, yet this counterproductive strategy only amplifies losses.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 雪月霜

title: Anthropic版「狼来了」引华尔街恐慌！27年漏洞，Mythos被8个AI秒杀
content: Anthropic’s preview AI Mythos was touted as discovering thousands of zero‑day vulnerabilities, sparking a panic among Wall Street regulators. Independent testing by the AISLE team showed that most claimed flaws were in obsolete software, mostly unexploitable, and that even small open‑source models could detect the same issues. The reported gains were largely hype, with only minimal improvements over existing models. Critics, including hacker George Hotz, argue that Mythos offers no real advancement and primarily serves marketing.

title: 用于编码的模型 除了 Claude 和 GPT 你还在用什么？
content: Developers are moving beyond Claude and GPT to models like Qwen3.6Plus and GLM5.1 for coding tasks. These newer options showed improved performance after a poor launch of Alibaba’s Coding Plan, which suffered long wait times and frequent 429 errors. Users report high efficiency when using Qwen3.6Plus and GLM5.1, though specific performance metrics vary. Other developers are also experimenting with different AI assistants, though the community has not identified a single dominant alternative.

title: 药厂近20年研发老兵告诉你80%的“创新药”都是伪创新（万字长文，建议先收藏）
content:
2019年，我还在药厂时，老板指着PPT上的PD-1管线说：“这个项目，资本市场喜欢，先上马再说。”我问：我们的分子比K药好在哪里？老板沉默了三秒，说：“先做出来再说。”三年后，这款“创新药”（某国产PD-1）上市，价格从2万降到2000，公司利润只剩零头。 现在市面上相当一部分所谓的“创新药”，不过是披着“新药”外衣的“伪创新”，今天不讲花哨的概念，用五个真实案例，把“伪创新”的套路扒干净。

看完这篇文章，你将学会：① 一眼识破伪创新的套路；② 用5个问题筛掉90%的垃圾标的；③ 找到真正的“十倍股”苗子。

title: 做了个 macOS 菜单栏工具，实时追踪 Claude Code 的 token 用量和订阅额度
content: I created a native macOS menu‑bar app that tracks Claude Code usage locally. It reads the ~/.claude/projects/ directory to detect all sessions, then counts costs daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly, with model‑specific split (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku). It shows real‑time 5‑hour and 7‑day token windows with countdowns, and includes a built‑in conversation browser with full‑text search and session restore. All data stays on the machine. The Swift/SwiftUI code is MIT‑licensed on GitHub.

title: 靠“老儿子”爆火的迪士尼，还不能掉以轻心
content: Disney’s “Snow‑Man” robot has captured public imagination, showcasing AI‑driven interactivity that boosts the brand’s appeal. However, the company suffers backlash over high‑priced offerings: a Shanghai Disney anniversary meal and the new Disney Cruise Line, both criticized for steep costs and subpar service. These incidents expose Disney’s transition from dream‑maker to profit‑seeker, risking consumer trust. To regain market standing, Disney must adopt more affordable options and tailor experiences to local audiences.

title: 90后女子后背疼，含硝酸甘油舌下片并开车9分钟去急诊，确诊心梗，这些自救行为哪些正确，哪些还能更稳妥？
content: 【#90后女子后背疼9分钟完成心梗自救#】#心梗发作前的主要症状#警惕！后背这种疼可能是心梗！近日，一名90后女子早上8点多感觉左侧后背传来一阵痉挛痛，起初以为是劳累没有休息好导致的岔气，没太在意，然而躺床上休息时后背依然疼，女子就含了家里的硝酸甘油舌下片，稍微缓解了一些，立马觉得不对劲了，就自己开车去医院急诊，路途用了9分钟，中间又含了一次，到医院检查后被确诊为心梗，而她整个自救过程也为医生抢救赢得了宝贵时间。医生提醒：心梗前兆易混淆，如感觉胸痛胸闷、呼吸困难、后背痛、莫名牙疼，一定要及时就医。

title: 注册尼日利亚区域的方法，包括如何更改区域
content: To sign up for a Nigerian Apple ID, use a non‑Chinese proxy and register via iCloud with any phone number (e.g., +86). Log into the new account on your device; it may default to China or another region. Change the region by logging into https://account.apple.com, selecting “Country/Region,” choosing Nigeria, and updating the “Personal Information” section. On the payment screen, select “None” and provide a Nigerian street address. Once saved, the account will be in Nigeria, enabling Norwegian‑region Claude subscriptions.

Most Chinese speakers lack confidence in English, treating it as trite status rather than a tool for global communication. Locals abroad rarely judge accents or grammar; sufficient interaction matters. Yet many Chinese criticize each other’s English, turning language into a contest of superiority. Even fluent diaspora admit they can’t reach native nuances. Those who intimidate outsiders yet judge peers reveal deep insecurity. Success comes from using language as a bridge, not a weapon for comparison.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 钟本聪Dylan

The measures aim to protect people from second‑hand smoke exposure and related health risks.

title: 美伊谈判失败了……按照剧本 | 原文
content: The article argues that U.S.–Iran talks never truly began; each side only paused to exchange demands for appearances, not genuine negotiation. The author, claiming to have offered de-escalation, sees the talks fail due to lack of common ground. Key issues cited include the Strait of Hormuz, Lebanon, nuclear enrichment, and sanctions. Ultimately, the author suggests the dialogue was staged and that there was no real consensus.

title: 女孩凌晨去警局报警遭漠视，被软饭前男友追至警局门口杀害，接警员的一句话惹众怒 | 原文
content: In Athens on April 1, 2024, 28‑year‑old Kyriaki Grivas visited a police station to file a report. Her request was ignored, and her former boyfriend, who had long relied on her financially, followed her to the station’s entrance. He strangled her there. A single remark by an officer became a flashpoint for public indignation, highlighting gaps in emergency response and the broader social context of personal violence in Greece.

It details the woman's bright early years, his abrupt fall into crime, and the eventual killing on the road. The story serves as a warning about dangerous criminals and a tribute to a talented girl who struggled to achieve her dreams.

title: 班克斯做梦也没想到，他的真实身份是这样曝光的！ | 原文
content: A Reuters investigation revealed that the anonymous street‑artist Banksy is actually Robin Gunningham, born in 1973 in Bristol, England. To stay incognito, Gunningham legally changed his name to the ordinary David Jones. The story followed years of speculation and was confirmed after months of journalism by Simon Gardner, James Pearson, and Blake Morison.

title: Software Preservation Group: C++ History Collection
content: The Software Preservation Group maintains the C++ History Collection, a curated archive of the language’s development. It documents key milestones, design decisions, and historical documents, offering researchers insights into C++’s evolution. The collection is hosted in a publicly accessible repository with regular updates and commentary, strengthening understanding of the language’s heritage.

title: 95 后年轻人返乡帮父亲一起养蛇，凭六万条毒蛇年入百万，利润真能这么高吗？毒蛇都有哪些价值？
content: 4月10日，广西桂林一位95年出生的秦女士大学毕业两年后回村，帮父亲一起养蛇，年入百万。目前，她养了5万多条五步蛇、将近1万条眼镜蛇。起初父亲不让自己接触这个行业，觉得养毒蛇危险性太高。后来父亲忙不过来，自己就回来帮忙。她说自己不怕蛇，出生前家里就在养蛇了。 广西95后女生返乡养蛇年入百万：目前养了5万多条五步蛇，近1万条眼镜蛇，“不怕蛇，出生前家里就养蛇了”_腾讯新闻

The U.S. has held 21‑hour talks with Iran, achieving "substantial" discussion but no agreement. President Vance stressed that Iran must give a long‑term, irreversible commitment to abandon nuclear weapons—beyond just stopping enrichment—to satisfy U.S. demands. He called the proposal a "best and final offer," indicating no further concessions. Asset freezes were debated but not resolved. Vance frequently consulted Trump, showing limited autonomy. The U.S. may use naval force in the Strait of Hormuz if talks stall, potentially reigniting conflict.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 但斌

title: 国内现在还有哪家量大管饱的大模型 plan 能买到
content: There are currently no large language models available for purchase in China, and those offered are sold out. International models can be used only briefly, with limited access, and developers are reluctant to integrate them into applications. Free APIs are available but are rate‑limited and provide lower quality results.

title: 万斯称美伊未达成协议，核心原因是伊朗未明确承诺放弃发展核武器，为什么核问题如此关键？下轮谈判重点在哪？
content: 当地时间4月12日上午，美国副总统万斯在巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡塞瑞纳酒店举行新闻发布会。万斯表示，在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行的美国与伊朗谈判未能达成协议，双方分歧依然明显。美方代表团将返美。 双方谈判21小时后仍未达成协议 万斯表示，美伊双方经过约21小时谈判后，仍未达成协议。双方已进行了多轮“实质性讨论”，但最终未能取得成果。他指出，美方已明确提出自身“红线”及可接受与不可接受的条件，而伊朗方面“选择不接受这些条款”。 美代表团将在未达成协议的情况下返回 万斯说：“我们现在已经进行了21个小时（谈判），与伊朗人进行了多次实质性讨论。这是好消息…

title: Openclaw 龙虾五天五连，24小时两更，火力全开！到底更新了些什么？
content: OpenClaw released five successive updates in five days, adding major features and fixes. The updates restructured memory and inference systems, introduced active memory plugins and built-in model providers, added local voice synthesis, expanded video generation with Seedance 2.0, and enhanced security across multiple channels. They fixed numerous channel crashes, tightened SSRF and credential protection, and improved Android pairing and Slack media handling. The latest release added ChatGPT import, rich text output, and a plugin manifesto for easier third‑party integration. The rapid cadence showcases OpenClaw’s intensive development cycle.

title: 2026 年， V 友们认为最省内存的浏览器是哪个呢？你目前在用的是什么浏览器？
世界公认的9本长脑子书
content: The article lists nine influential books that foster critical thinking: “Thinking, Fast and Slow” explains dual processing and urges slow analysis to avoid intuition errors; “Beyond IQ” warns of rationality deficits in smart people; “Sapiens” shows how cultural myths shape behavior; “Principles” advocates systematic decision frameworks; “The Republic” uses the Cave allegory to illustrate conceptual confinement; “Guns, Germs, and Steel” attributes global inequality to geography; “One Hundred Years of Solitude” explores solitude as human truth; “Gödel, Escher, Bach” links mathematics, art, music to self‑reflection; and “The Spectrum of Consciousness” promotes integrating contradictory aspects of self for sustainable growth.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

title: 伊朗前副总统之子，在美国被捕 | 原文
content: Three Iranian citizens linked to the Iranian regime were detained in the United States. The U.S. Department of State says they are held by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement pending deportation and have lost their green cards. One detainee is the son of former Iranian vice‑president Masoumeh Ebtekar, whom the U.S. alleges represented radical activists during the 1979 hostage crisis.

title: 估值8520亿，CEO零持股，股东神仙打架：谁在掌控OpenAI？
content: OpenAI, now valued at $852 billion after a $122 billion funding round, faces governance and financial challenges. CEO Sam Altman holds no shares, making his position fragile after a board ousting and later reinstatement. The company has shifted from non‑profit to for‑profit, with shareholders like Microsoft (26.8%), OpenAI Foundation (25.8%), SoftBank (11.7%), Amazon (4.7%) and Nvidia (3.5%). Expected IPO timing and large future AI‑compute costs raise doubts about long‑term viability.

title: 一个恋爱脑的治愈 | 原文
content: The passage reflects on a recent rewatch of “The Good Wife,” focusing on Season 2’s opening scene where Will’s hesitant confession to Alicia is dismissed, yet he persists by calling her again with a heartfelt plan. The narrator recalls youthful frustration over what might have happened had a voice message been deleted, and now observes that Will’s observation about their poor timing holds true, underscoring the show’s realistic portrayal of love.

title: Stop Thinking of HTTP as Request/Response. It's a Universal Data Layout — and It's Faster Than Binary Protocol.
content:
Everyone "knows" binary protocol is faster than HTTP. I used to believe that too. Until I stopped looking at HTTP as a wire protocol and started looking at it as what it actually is — a layout engine for the CPU.

That reframe changed everything.

title: 穷人为什么这么难？
content: The article critiques “poverty reversal” experiments worldwide, showing that participants—regardless of background—cannot succeed when stripped of savings, credit, or networks. In Hong Kong and the US, participants survive only by exhausting every paycheck on rent and food, leaving no room for learning, investing, or long‑term planning. The piece argues that consistent working‑class hardship prevents the accumulation of capital and the reap‑of‑compound‑growth that wealth accumulation relies on.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 何纯在南国

content: Anthropic is overtaking OpenAI as the market’s favorite AI firm. OpenAI’s 850 billion‑dollar valuation struggles with low paid‑user rates (<6%) and fragmented consumer demand, forcing it to experiment with ads and facing tough monetization. Anthropic focuses on high-end enterprise tools like code generation, targeting businesses willing to pay for premium, reliable models (Claude). Its clear revenue model has produced $30 billion ARR, surpassing OpenAI’s $25 billion. Consequently, investors view Anthropic as a profitable high‑growth opportunity, while OpenAI’s quarterly IPO push reflects weaker capital supply.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 24 岁主播直播晕倒被当场辞退，已申请劳动仲裁，这种情况能获得赔偿吗？遇到类似情况需要保存哪些证据？
content: 24岁主播直播晕倒竟被当场辞退，当事人宋女士说，晕倒约十几秒后就站起来继续播，一分钟后被另一主播接替，半小时后被结算工资。涉事公司回应称，是“劝退”而非“辞退”，“打听到她之前也晕倒过，确实不适合干直播。”律师表示，该公司属于违法解除劳动关系，建议当事人尽快收集并固定证据维权。据悉，宋女士入职该公司仅8天，约定底薪7000元。目前，宋女士申请赔偿，但被公司拒绝，正在走劳动仲裁程序。 24岁女主播直播晕倒竟被当场辞退、结算工资 公司：是劝退，她不适合干这行_腾讯新闻直播晕倒被辞退女主播发声：是第一次晕倒，晕倒后立马爬起

A large portion of Buffett’s portfolio is sold relatively quickly: about 30% of his stock holdings are liquidated within six months, around 60% within a year, and fewer than 10% are held for longer than ten years.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 流水白菜

title: 宇树机器人百米冲刺10米每秒，逼近博尔特记录，这个速度是什么水平？能应用到哪些现实场景？
content: On April 11, Yushu Technology announced that its H1 humanoid robot achieved a peak speed of 10 m/s over a 100‑meter run, setting a new world record for robot sprinting. This velocity closely rivals Usain Bolt’s record pace of 10.44 m/s (time 9.58 s). The robots’ capability suggests potential applications in logistics, search‑and‑rescue, and any scenario where rapid human‑like movement is advantageous.

title: 2026 04 12 HackerNews
content: On 12 Apr 2026 Hacker News highlighted a Mac‑Book corner‑polishing DIY, NASA’s Artemis II lunar‑orbit splash‑down, open‑source AI models replicating Mythos security findings, massive Firefox‑extension scraping, AI‑assisted Linux kernel contributions, Ugandan chimp war studies, France’s move from Windows to Linux for digital sovereignty, Sam Altman’s response to a Molotov‑cocktail attack, South Korea’s universal mobile‑data plan, and the ad‑ware injection of the JSON Formatter Chrome extension. All threads spurred discussion on safety, openness, dependency risks, and AI governance.

OpenAI admits a pricing page error, clarifying that ChatGPT Pro 100 USD offers 10× and 200 USD offers 20× the Plus plan’s usage during the promotion ending May 31. Alibaba Cloud stops renewals of its Coding Plan Lite. MiniMax releases the MiniMax‑M2.7 model. GitHub Copilot introduces new rate limits and disables the Opus 4.6 Fast model for Pro+ users. GLM Coding Plan sees a near‑tripling price hike. OpenClaw 2026.4.10 improves memory. Nous Research adds native WeChat support to Hermes Agent. OpenAI revokes Axios certificates and urges Mac users to update. Sam Altman reports a failed attack on his San Francisco home and urges AI democratization.

title: 这些声音，能安抚你躁动不安的大脑
content: Research shows specific sounds, like low‑frequency brown noise or film scores, can improve focus for people with ADHD. Because their brains need heightened stimulation, quiet environments can feel unsettling. Tailored audio, such as long, rhythmic tracks from apps like Brain.FM, offers just enough background stimulation without distraction. Individual responses vary; experimentation and tracking personal performance are key. These non‑pharmacological tools carry minimal risk and may significantly help attention and productivity.

title: 大厂商战，开始给员工砌墙了
content: The article explains how major tech firms have shifted from external price wars to internal defense, blocking competitors’ platforms and external AI tools to protect proprietary traffic and data. Employees report being denied access to rival services and must use in‑house models, which limits productivity. Firms now invest heavily in AI infrastructure, talent, and internal tooling, turning “heavy assets” like compute, models, and data into new competitive moats. The shift reflects a broader move from flashy subsidies to robust, data‑centric competition.
